mission_statement: Democratic Justice publishes accountability reporting built to last. When a story carries a Proof Card, readers can inspect the documents, check the claims, and judge the conclusion.
footer_description: Democratic Justice publishes document-based investigations with source records, clear findings, and archives built for search, citation, and return.
meta_description: Democratic Justice publishes document-based investigations, source records, and proof-backed reporting on power, elections, and public failure.
